title: 'Eliyphaz #0464
definition:
Eliphaz = "my God is (fine) gold"

 1) Esau's son, father of Teman
 2) the Temanite friend of Job
nasbUsage:
Definition: Eliphaz = "my God is (fine) gold"

 1) Esau's son, father of Teman
 2) the Temanite friend of Job

    NASB:  God is fine gold, a son of Esau, also a friend of Job
